summary: GharSetu Testing Iteration 6 - All requested features verified. Homepage category filter tabs, Voice Search, Chatbot with vaanix.in branding, Listing 'Book & Pay Now' button, and mobile responsiveness all working. One backend bug found in payment order creation API.

critical.issue: 500 Internal Server Error - AttributeError: 'str' object has no attribute 'credentials'. Bug at line 1743 in server.py - get_current_user(credentials.credentials) should be get_current_user(credentials)
critical.fix_required: Change line 1743 from 'user_id = await get_current_user(credentials.credentials)' to 'user_id = await get_current_user(credentials)'

passed_tests: Category tabs in search bar: Home, Business, Stay, Event, Services
Tabs use Gujarati labels on mobile (ઘર, બિઝનેસ, રહેવાનું, ઇવેન્ટ)
Search button navigates to category page with query params
Voice search trigger button in search bar (data-testid='voice-search-trigger')
Voice search modal opens on click
Modal shows microphone icon and example phrases
Quick prompts: '2 BHK flat Surat', 'Office rent Adajan'
Stay category listings display 'Book & Pay Now' button
Payment button requires login (shows toast 'Please login to make payment')
Payment config API returns enabled:true with rzp_test_SJsbOORnwWigFu key
Payment modal shows price breakdown with platform fee
Note: Order creation API has bug (500 error) - see backend_issues
Category tabs show Gujarati labels on mobile
Search inputs stack vertically on mobile
Voice search button visible on mobile
Chatbot works on mobile with full-screen modal
Listing cards display with images, prices, locations
critical_code_review_comments: Bug in payment order creation - incorrect parameter passed to get_current_user function
Vaanix.in branding properly integrated in chatbot
seed_data_creation: Created test users for payment, booking, chatbot tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features working except payment order creation API (500 error). Bug is simple fix at line 1743 in server.py. After fix, payment flow should work with Razorpay test keys. Chatbot has vaanix.in branding, voice search modal works, category tabs in homepage search bar work. Mobile responsive on 375px width.

Homepage_Category_Tabs.details: 5 category tabs in hero search - Home, Business, Stay, Event, Services

Voice_Search.details: Button in search bar, modal with microphone, Gujarati support

AI_Chatbot_Vaanix_Branding.details: Floating button, 'Powered by Vaanix.In' branding, Gujarati greeting, quick prompts

Listing_Book_Pay_Button.details: 'Book & Pay Now' button on Stay/Event/Services listings, requires login

Razorpay_Payment.details: Config API returns enabled:true with test key. Order creation has bug (500 error)

Mobile_Responsive_Homepage.details: 375px viewport tested, all elements visible and functional

Category_Pages_Filters.details: All 5 categories, filter button, grid/list toggle

rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: Incorrect parameter passing - get_current_user expects HTTPAuthorizationCredentials object but receives string (credentials.credentials)
rca_of_the_issue.fix: Change line 1743 from 'user_id = await get_current_user(credentials.credentials)' to 'user_id = await get_current_user(credentials)'
rca_of_the_issue.similar_issues: Same pattern may exist in /api/payments/verify endpoint - check line ~1796
